featureName: Sprint 6 — Poster & Provider Full Journey Integration Tests
description: Write and run complete user journey integration tests for both the Job Poster and Job Seeker (Provider) roles. Tests run on iOS simulator with Firebase Emulators. Each test walks through the entire user flow from registration to task completion, seeding backend data where needed for cross-user interactions. After implementation, run the tests and document all failures/bugs found.

userStories.title: Job Poster Full Journey Test
userStories.description: Integration test covering the complete poster lifecycle: register with email → select poster role → setup profile → post task → view bids → accept bid → chat with provider → mark complete → verify final state.
acceptanceCriteria: Create integration_test/poster_journey_test.dart
Test setup: initialize Firebase emulators, pre-seed a provider user (Ben Lim, role=provider) and leave them ready for backend bid seeding
Step 1 — App Launch: pump app, verify splash screen shows 'NeighbourGo', wait for welcome screen with 'Continue with Email' button
Step 2 — Register: tap 'Continue with Email', enter email 'poster-test@neighbourgo.com' and password 'test123456', tap 'Continue', verify navigation to role selection
Step 3 — Select Role: tap 'I need help' (poster), verify selected, tap 'Continue', verify profile setup screen

Step 4 — Profile Setup: enter name 'Alice Tan', headline 'Busy mum looking for help', select neighbourhood 'Ang Mo Kio', tap 'Complete Setup', verify home screen shows 'Hi, Alice!' and 'Post a Task' button

Step 5 — Post Task: tap Post FAB → Step 1: select 'Home Cleaning' → Step 2: title 'Deep clean 3-room HDB', description (20+ chars) → Step 3: location 'Blk 456 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3', neighbourhood 'Ang Mo Kio' → Step 4: budget '50' → Step 5: verify review, tap 'Post Task'
Step 6 — Verify task in Firestore: status=open, categoryId=cleaning, budgetMin=50, posterId matches
Step 7 — Seed bid: programmatically create bid from pre-seeded provider (Ben Lim, amount=65, message='5 years experience') in Firestore bids subcollection
Step 8 — View bids: navigate to task detail, verify bid visible with S$65, provider name, Accept/Reject buttons
Step 9 — Accept bid: tap Accept, verify task status=assigned and bid status=accepted in Firestore
Step 10 — Chat: tap 'Message Provider', verify ChatThreadScreen, send message 'Hi Ben, when can you come?', verify message appears, verify in Firestore
Step 11 — Complete task: navigate to task detail, tap 'Mark as Complete', confirm dialog, verify task status=completed in Firestore
Step 12 — Final state: verify completed task not in Active Tasks on home, verify profile shows 'Alice Tan'
Teardown: sign out, cleanup emulator data
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Job Seeker (Provider) Full Journey Test
userStories.description: Integration test covering the complete provider lifecycle: register with email → select provider role → setup profile → browse tasks → submit bid → get accepted (seeded) → chat with poster → task completed (seeded) → verify final state.
acceptanceCriteria: Create integration_test/provider_journey_test.dart
Test setup: initialize Firebase emulators, pre-seed a poster user (Alice Tan, role=poster) and an open task ('Deep clean 3-room HDB', cleaning, S$50-80, Ang Mo Kio) in Firestore
Step 1 — App Launch: pump app, verify splash → welcome screen with 'Continue with Email'
Step 2 — Register: tap 'Continue with Email', enter email 'provider-test@neighbourgo.com' and password 'test123456', tap 'Continue', verify role selection
Step 3 — Select Role: tap 'I want to earn' (provider), verify selected, tap 'Continue', verify profile setup

Step 4 — Profile Setup: enter name 'Ben Lim', headline 'Experienced cleaner & handyman', select neighbourhood 'Bedok', tap 'Complete Setup', verify ProviderHomeScreen shows 'Hi, Ben!' and 'Open Tasks'
Step 5 — Browse tasks: verify seeded task 'Deep clean 3-room HDB' visible in Open Tasks or Discover tab, tap to open TaskDetailScreen
Step 6 — Verify provider task detail: 'Submit Bid' button visible, no 'Mark as Complete', poster info shows 'Alice Tan'
Step 7 — Submit bid: tap 'Submit Bid', enter amount '65', enter proposal (20+ chars), tap submit, verify snackbar success
Step 8 — Verify bid in Firestore: amount=65, status=pending, providerId matches
Step 9 — Verify own bid view: task detail shows 'Your Bid' section with S$65 and 'Pending' badge
Step 10 — Seed acceptance: programmatically set bid status=accepted, task status=assigned, assignedProviderId=providerUid in Firestore
Step 11 — Verify accepted state: navigate to task detail, verify 'Accepted' badge, 'Message Poster' button visible
Step 12 — Chat: tap 'Message Poster', send message 'Hi Alice, I can come tomorrow at 10am.', verify message appears, verify in Firestore
Step 13 — Seed completion: programmatically set task status=completed, completedAt in Firestore
Step 14 — Verify completed state: task detail shows 'Completed' status, 'Message Poster' still visible
Step 15 — Final state: verify profile shows 'Ben Lim', home no longer shows completed task in open tasks
Teardown: sign out, cleanup emulator data
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Run Tests & Document All Bugs Found
userStories.description: Actually execute both journey tests on the iOS simulator with Firebase emulators, collect all failures, and document every bug found.
acceptanceCriteria: Ensure Firebase emulators can be started (firebase emulators:start)
Run poster_journey_test.dart on iOS simulator: flutter test integration_test/poster_journey_test.dart -d <simulator_id>
Run provider_journey_test.dart on iOS simulator: flutter test integration_test/provider_journey_test.dart -d <simulator_id>
If tests fail, document each failure with: (1) which step failed, (2) expected behavior, (3) actual behavior, (4) error message/stack trace
Create a bug report file at scripts/ralph/bug_report.md listing all issues found
Categorize bugs as: CRITICAL (blocks user flow), MAJOR (feature broken but workaround exists), MINOR (cosmetic/UX issue)
If possible, fix simple bugs (typos, missing null checks, wrong text) directly and re-run
Final summary: how many steps passed, how many failed, which features are working end-to-end
flutter analyze shows 0 errors
